2604.06262.title: From Exposure to Internalization: Dual-Stream Calibration for In-context Clinical Reasoning
2604.06262.paper_summary: Contextual clinical reasoning demands robust inference grounded in complex, heterogeneous clinical records. While state-of-the-art fine-tuning, in-context learning (ICL), and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enable knowledge exposure, they often fall short of genuine contextual internalization: dynamically adjusting a model's internal representations to the subtle nuances of individual cases at inference time. To address this, we propose Dual-Stream Calibration (DSC), a test-time training framework that transcends superficial knowledge exposure to achieve deep internalization during inference. DSC facilitates input internalization by synergistically aligning two calibration streams. Unlike passive context exposure, the Semantic Calibration Stream enforces a deliberative reflection on core evidence, internalizing semantic anchors by minimizing entropy to stabilize generative trajectories. Simultaneously, the Structural Calibration Stream assimilates latent inferential dependencies through an iterative meta-learning objective. By training on specialized support sets at test-time, this stream enables the model to bridge the gap between external evidence and internal logic, synthesizing fragmented data into a coherent response. Our approach shifts the reasoning paradigm from passive attention-based matching to an active refinement of the latent inferential space. Validated against thirteen clinical datasets, DSC demonstrates superiority across three distinct task paradigms, consistently outstripping state-of-the-art baselines ranging from training-dependent models to test-time learning frameworks.
2604.06262.paper_summary_zh: 上下文臨床推理需要基於複雜且異質的臨床記錄進行穩健的推斷。雖然最先進的微調、上下文學習（ICL）和檢索增強生成（RAG）能夠實現知識的曝光，但它們往往無法實現真正的上下文內化：在推斷時動態調整模型的內部表徵以適應個別案例的細微差別。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了雙流校準（DSC），這是一個測試時訓練框架，超越了表面的知識曝光，以在推斷過程中實現深層內化。DSC通過協同對齊兩個校準流來促進輸入內化。與被動的上下文曝光不同，語義校準流強調對核心證據的深思熟慮，通過最小化熵來內化語義錨點，以穩定生成軌跡。同時，結構校準流通過迭代的元學習目標同化潛在的推理依賴關係。通過在測試時對專門的支持集進行訓練，這一流使模型能夠彌合外部證據與內部邏輯之間的差距，將零散數據合成為一致的回應。我們的方法將推理範式從被動的基於注意力的匹配轉變為對潛在推理空間的主動精煉。在對十三個臨床數據集進行驗證後，DSC在三個不同的任務範式中顯示出優越性，始終超越從依賴訓練的模型到測試時學習框架的最先進基準。
2604.06262.author: Chuang Zhao et.al.
2604.06262.authors: Chuang Zhao, Hongke Zhao, Xiaofang Zhou, Xiaomeng Li
